form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 4 over 2200m, 11 len behind That's Amore carrying 59.5kg at $51. Before that got back early 10th of 13 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 29 len behind Constitution Hill carrying 60kg at $101. Likely to go around at long odds again.

At the latest run 8th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 4 over 2200m, 11 len behind That's Amore carrying 59.5kg at $51. Before that got back early 10th of 13 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 29 len behind Constitution Hill carrying 60kg at $101. Likely to go around at long odds again.

form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 23 at Cheltenham on March 13 over 3400m, slow going 7 len behind Wilful with 67.5kg at $34. The run before that 7th of 13 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 17 len behind Constitution Hill carrying 60kg at $6. Better than that last effort and can make amends.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-14). At the latest run 8th of 23 at Cheltenham on March 13 over 3400m, slow going 7 len behind Wilful with 67.5kg at $34. The run before that 7th of 13 at Southwell All Weather on February 20 over 2400m, 17 len behind Constitution Hill carrying 60kg at $6. Better than that last effort and can make amends.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by neck Newcastle All Weather November 27 over 1600m defeating Eddaari carrying 59kg at $8. On debut fifth of 10 at Wolverhampton November 8 over 1700m, 7 len behind Sahara King with 60.5kg at $5. Rates highly and is one of the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(10.5). Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by neck Newcastle All Weather November 27 over 1600m defeating Eddaari carrying 59kg at $8. On debut fifth of 10 at Wolverhampton November 8 over 1700m, 7 len behind Sahara King with 60.5kg at $5. Rates highly and is one of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 4th of 9 at this track on October 29 over 1700m, slow going 6 len behind Hell Yeah He Did carrying 58kg at $23. See how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 4th of 9 at this track on October 29 over 1700m, slow going 6 len behind Hell Yeah He Did carrying 58kg at $23. See how he returns.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at this track October 8 over 1700m, 5 len behind Wise Prince with 60.5kg at $11. On debut ran last in a small field at Sandown Park September 17 over 1600m, soft track; 12 len behind Accredit carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. A bold run while fresh is anticipated.

On debut ran last in a small field at Sandown Park September 17 over 1600m, soft track; 12 len behind Accredit carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. A bold run while fresh is anticipated.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when 2nd in a small field at Doncaster on October 24 over 1600m, slow going 1.3 len behind Golden Story carrying 60.5kg at $4.30. Nicely placed to break through.

form.formComment: First-starter by Munnings out of Faithfully. Capable of a cheeky run.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Munnings out of Faithfully. Capable of a cheeky run.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 7 at Newmarket (Rowley) on October 22 over 1600m, 25 len behind Golden Knight carrying 60.5kg at $41. Hard to enthuse on that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 7 at Newmarket (Rowley) on October 22 over 1600m, 25 len behind Golden Knight carrying 60.5kg at $41. Hard to enthuse on that effort.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, 3rd of 7 at Southwell All Weather on January 17 over 1600m, 4 len behind Knowledge with 53kg at $8. Second-up 3rd in a small field at Southwell All Weather on February 28 over 2200m, 6 len behind Pursuit Of Love with 58kg at $13. Should be right in the finish.
